sn22.145:1.2: “Monks, whatever is not-self, you should abandon desire-passion there.
sn22.145:1.4: “Form, monks, is not-self. You should abandon desire-passion there.
sn22.145:1.5: “Feeling is not-self. You should abandon desire-passion there.
sn22.145:1.6: “Perception is not-self. You should abandon desire-passion there.
sn22.145:1.7: “Fabrications are not-self. You should abandon desire-passion there.
sn22.145:1.8: “Consciousness is not-self. You should abandon desire-passion there.
sn22.145:1.9: “Monks, whatever is not-self, you should abandon desire-passion there.”
